name: Boss says my hearing loss is from age or hunting, what now?
description: Get audiologist to link to work NIHL pattern.[4]

mainEntity.name: Boss says my hearing loss is from age or hunting, what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Get audiologist to link to work NIHL pattern.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Counter with medical evidence showing NIHL pattern inconsistent with presbycusis or non-work noise.[4] Context: Idaho cases reject age claims if work exposure matches high-frequency loss.[4] Key factors: Expert audiologist opinion, workplace decibel proof >85 dB, protection failures.[1][4] Practical guidance: Avoid debating boss; get independent eval, file claim with records, let lawyer challenge defenses via OSHA complaints.[2][7] Proof wins over excuses.
